nasb.text: You shall speak to the sons of Israel, saying, ‘This shall be a holy anointing oil to Me throughout your generations.

esv.text: And you shall say to the people of Israel, ‘This shall be my holy anointing oil throughout your generations.

cnv.text: 你要告訴以色列人說：‘你們世世代代要把這油歸我為聖膏油。

ccb.text: 你要把我的话告诉以色列百姓，‘我要世世代代以这油为圣膏油。
